title: rubus × occiduus
intro: Rubus × occiduus, also known as the black raspberry, is a hybrid plant species that combines the characteristics of Rubus idaeus and Rubus allegheniensis. The leaves, stems, and roots of the black raspberry plant have been used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus × occiduus include its potential to reduce the risk of certain cancers, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant protection against oxidative stress. Rubus × occiduus is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or supplement, and can also be consumed fresh as a fruit, making it a versatile and valuable herbal remedy.
